title: cordiera vaccinioides
intro: Cordiera vaccinioides, also known as the "yerba de la montaña" or mountain tea, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing cardiovascular support. Cordiera vaccinioides is typically prepared as a tea by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it can also be found in herbal supplement form or as a tincture.
